rationale: No direct conflict. Educ. Code §21.002 governs contract types for school employees and contains no reference to funding, appraised value, or homestead exemptions.
quote: A school district shall employ each classroom teacher, principal, librarian, nurse, or school counselor under:
_note: Proposed change may indirectly reduce school district revenue, but no legal conflict exists with the operative text of §21.002.
